express_options: Express login via Google or Discord

forgot_password_page.title: Reset your password
forgot_password_page.subtitle: Enter your account email and we will send you a password reset link if the account exists.
forgot_password_page.success_description: If an account exists for that email address, a password reset link has been sent.

reset_password_page.title: Choose a new password
reset_password_page.subtitle: Set a new password for your FullParty account.
reset_password_page.complete_description: Your password has been updated. You can log in now.

errors.invalid_token: This password reset link is invalid or has expired.
errors.invalid_user: We could not find an account for that password reset request.
errors.generic: We could not reset your password right now. Please request a new reset link.

verify_email.title: Verify your email
verify_email.subtitle: Before you continue, please confirm your email address.
verify_email.resent_success: A new verification link has been sent to your email address.
verify_email.sent_to: We sent a verification email to:
verify_email.instructions: Open the email and click the verification link to activate your account and continue to FullParty.
verify_email.help_spam: Check your spam or junk folder.
verify_email.help_delay: It may take a minute or two to arrive.
verify_email.help_resend: You can request a new verification email below.
